about_quotes.speaker: Joe Loyacano
about_quotes.evidence: That's Sharky on trumpet, Mike Ryan on drums, myself on bass, Johnny Gregory on sax, and Johnny Miller on piano.

about_quotes.speaker: Red Callender
about_quotes.evidence: There were two bass players, Johnny Miller and I, and we did a two-bass solo on 'I Found A New Baby.'

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: We put this big band together... Johnny Miller (PHONETIC) was the bass player that went with the King Cole Trio and that's about it... We were -- all the guys in the band sang.

about_quotes.speaker: Sharkey Bonano
about_quotes.evidence: Yes, we worked there a whole season. ... I was going to ask about another early record you made back in the 20's with Johnny Miller.

about_quotes.speaker: Godfrey Hirsch
about_quotes.evidence: And this is Johnny Barsdorf's band at the Tokyo Gardens, 1922... Johnny Miller, he was, I could break a piano for you.

about_quotes.speaker: Norman Brownlee
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] Johnny Miller I think [INTERVIEWEE] his name starts with a P I believe uh Panera his name was Panera
